name: Beef Hash
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Chopped cooked eye of round (roast)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the hot water and beef bouillon cube in a small bowl until the cube dissolves.
2. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the cubed potatoes, chopped onion, and minced garlic. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
3. Stir in the cooked beef cubes, salt, pepper, and parsley (if using). Reduce the heat to low and cover the skillet. Simmer for an additional 15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the beef is heated through.
4. Serve immediately and enjoy your Beef Hash!
